title: Bare Bones x Enchantment Overhaul
description: Bare Bones resource pack compatibility for the Enchantment Overhaul mod. Textures by LolloNapo.
body:
# Bare bones x Enchantment Overhaul

A texture pack that adapts [Enchantment Overhaul](modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-overhaul-fabric) to match the [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) aesthetic.

## What it changes

- Warding and Tempering armor overlays for Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite, Chainmail and Leather
- Smithing template item icons (Warding, Tempering, Honing, Grinding)

All textures respect Bare Bones' simplified 2-tone style.

## Requirements

- **Enchantment Overhaul** (required - this pack only alters its textures)
- **Bare Bones** (required - the pack is designed to sit on top of it)

Place both packs in your resource pack list, with this pack **above** Bare Bones.

## Credits

Textures by **LolloNapo**. 
Pack assembled for the Enchantment Overhaul mod by Akitain.
